steps.title: Choose a real contrast
steps.content: Both sculptures are public art, but their subject matter differs. Marlow's Freedom Sculpture depicts people emerging from a building, while Whitaker's Diminish and Ascend depicts a staircase.

steps.title: Reject shared or one-sided facts
steps.content: A fails because both works are displayed publicly. C gives a similarity rather than a contrast. D describes only Whitaker's sculpture. The useful contrast is that Marlow's work depicts human subjects and Whitaker's does not. The answer is B.
